tasks.title: Database Schema & Auth Setup
tasks.description: Set up Supabase tables (User, Scenario, ScenarioSession, UserProgress, Badge, Subscription) and configure Kakao/Google OAuth.

tasks.title: App Shell & UI Foundation
tasks.description: Initialize Shadcn UI components, set up the Next.js root layout, navigation bar, and basic routing structure for Phase 1.

tasks.title: AI Roleplay API
tasks.description: Implement the GPT-4o server route (`api/chat/route.ts`) or Server Action for NPC interactions based on system prompts.

tasks.title: Scenario & Chat UI
tasks.description: Build the Scenario selection cards, Pre/Post Anxiety Slider UI, and the Real-time Chat Interface.

tasks.title: Progress & Gamification API
tasks.description: Implement logic to calculate session scores, update UserProgress, and unlock Badges.

tasks.title: Dashboard UI
tasks.description: Build the Dashboard page displaying weekly anxiety graphs, current level, and unlocked badges.

tasks.title: Subscription & Payments
tasks.description: Integrate Toss Payments UI widget and implement the Paywall for premium scenarios.
